arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres to Arsenal: Why Mikel Arteta would 'need convincing' to sign Andrea Berta favourite
arts.sum: Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta would need to convince Mikel Arteta that Viktor Gyokeres is the right striker to sign this summer, Charles Watts believes.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres AGREES to join Arsenal
arts.sum: Correio da Manha reports that Berta played a "decisive role" in the convincing Gyokeres to join Arsenal over multiple other top European clubs such as Man Utd, Barcelona, Chelsea and Newcastle. Viktor Gyokeres has agreed to join Arsenal this summer, according to Correio da Manha.

arts.ttl: 'I actually think': What Alan Shearer said about Matheus Cunha may deter Andrea Berta from making Arsenal move
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has just made a worrying claim about Matheus Cunha at Wolves which could make interested clubs think twice about moving for him. Arsenal...

arts.ttl: Gyokeres transfer heats up as Man Utd find striker solution
arts.sum: Plus, Man Utd may have found a new striker solution and Chelsea face a potential Champions League ban. Gyokeres transfer heats up as Man Utd find striker solution
